explanation: This property states that it is always true that if the system is in PCV mode, then the breathing cycle's total time and expiratory time are defined by the respiratory rate and the inspiratory-to-expiratory ratio, respectively. decision3_substring: shall be defined by inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere, respiratory rate (RR_PCV) and the ratio between the inspiratory and expiratory times (I:E PCV ).
output_structured_natural_language: while PCVMode, upon breathingCycleStart, immediately satisfy ExpiratoryTime_equalTo_breathingCycleTime_divideBy_1_plus_ItoE_PCV

explanation: This property states that whenever a new breathing cycle commences while the system is in PCV mode, the definition of the breathing cycle, specifically its total duration (respiratory rate) and the inspiratory-to-expiratory time ratio, must continuously hold true for the duration of that cycle. The inspiratory pressure (Pinsp_PCV) part of the definition is not captured due to the lack of a specific atomic proposition.
decision3_substring: shall be defined by inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere, respiratory rate (RR_PCV) and the ratio between the inspiratory and expiratory times (I:E PCV ).
output_structured_natural_language: only while PCVMode, whenever breathingCycleStart, always satisfy breathingCycleTime_equalTo_1_divideBy_RR_PCV & ExpiratoryTime_equalTo_breathingCycleTime_divideBy_1_plus_ItoE_PCV
